command_failures.command: /bin/zsh -lc 'cd backend && if [[ -x .venv/bin/python ]]; then PY=.venv/bin/python; else PY=python3; fi && $PY -m ruff check --fix app/api/v1/routes/sessions.py app/db/__init__.py app/models/__init__.py app/repositories/sessions.py app/services/plan_revisions.py app/services/session_hydration.py app/services/sessions.py app/services/story_tools.py tests/test_session_api.py tests/test_session_beat_sheet_service.py tests/test_session_service.py tests/test_story_tools.py && $PY -m ruff format app/api/v1/routes/sessions.py app/db/__init__.py app/models/__init__.py app/repositories/sessions.py app/services/plan_revisions.py app/services/session_hydration.py app/services/sessions.py app/services/story_tools.py tests/test_session_api.py tests/test_session_beat_sheet_service.py tests/test_session_service.py tests/test_story_tools.py'

/bin/zsh -lc "./scripts/dev-compose.sh exec -T backend python - <<'PY'
from app.db import Pitch
from app.db.session import get_session_factory
from app.models import WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState
from app.services.sessions import SessionService

session = get_session_factory()()
try:
    service = SessionService(session)
    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title='Revision History QA')
    service.select_genre(snapshot.id, genre_slug='quest-fantasy')
    service.select_tone(snapshot.id, tone_profile_slug='hushed-wonder')
    service.update_stage_state(
        snapshot.id,
        stage=WorkflowStage.BRIEF,
        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,
        detail='Accepted a manual brief for revision-history QA.',
    )

    session.add_all([
        Pitch(
            session_id=snapshot.id,
            generation_key='qa-batch',
            pitch_index=1,
            title='Lantern Harbor Promise',
            logline='Mira follows a drifting lantern and learns the harbor is helping her home.',
            summary='A gentle harbor quest where a lantern becomes a bedtime-safe guide.',
            bedtime_notes='Keep each turn quickly reassuring and visibly warm.',
            is_selected=False,
        ),
        Pitch(
            session_id=snapshot.id,
            generation_key='qa-batch',
            pitch_index=2,
            title='Otter Bell Moonpath',
            logline='An otter and child trace a bell-lit route that settles every worried ripple.',
            summary='A slightly different bedtime mystery with the same calm return-home arc.',
            bedtime_notes='Let the mystery read as curious, not sharp.',
            is_selected=False,
        ),
    ])
    session.commit()

    pitches = session.query(Pitch).filter(Pitch.session_id == snapshot.id).order_by(Pitch.pitch_index.asc()).all()
    service.select_pitch(snapshot.id, pitch_id=pitches[0].id)
    selected = service.select_pitch(snapshot.id, pitch_id=pitches[1].id)

    print(snapshot.id)
    print(selected.snapshot.current_plan_revision.revision_number if selected.snapshot.current_plan_revision else 'none')
    print(selected.snapshot.selected_pitch.title if selected.snapshot.selected_pitch else 'none')
finally:
    session.close()
PY"
